description: Authoritative FantasyDisk task board for Codex and Claude since 2026-07-13. Every actionable project task is created and tracked here; assignments dispatch local agents through the Multica daemon. Jira is legacy read-only history only. GitHub resource: FomaBy/FantasyDisk; target integration branch: dev. After every successful push to origin/dev, safely fast-forward the canonical operator test mirror at /Users/sergeyfomin/Documents/AI Agent when that path exists; never overwrite operator WIP, and record the local mirror SHA or blocker in final issue evidence. Final evidence includes commit SHA, push state, tests, local Godot mirror state, QA verdict, and disk cleanup.
title: FantasyDisk
